releaseNotes: v0.24.18 — Four more audit findings fixed. (1) Trial signup flow flipped: pharmacies now created server-side AFTER Stripe Checkout completes (not before), so abandoned signups can't leave orphan pharmacy rows. Setup code arrives by email when the customer pays. (2) Concurrent-edit divergence fixed: edits that happen on two devices at the same Lamport tick now resolve deterministically via device-id tiebreak instead of diverging across devices. (3) Sync now filters ops authored by Disconnected devices, so stale data from previously-revoked devices stops replaying. (4) Trial-expiring-soon banner: when the trial has 7 days or less left, the dashboard shows an amber warning before the trial actually flips to read-only mode.
